rationale: The cited paper appears in grouped citations when the authors describe prior eye-tracking research and position their video-tracking method relative to existing tools. In these passages, Zhang et al. (2009) is used as a representative example of eye-tracking work, not as a specific theoretical or methodological basis for the focal models in this article. The citing paper does not rely on or discuss the cited paper's Bayesian mediation framework, endogeneity correction, or findings in developing its own analyses.
